sentences.arabic: زُرْتُ السُّوقَ الْقَدِيمَةَ يَوْمَ أَمْسِ فِي وَسَطِ الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Juče sam posjetio staru pijacu u centru grada.
sentences.translationEn: I visited the old market yesterday in the city center.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ رَائِحَةُ التَّوَابِلِ مِثْلَ الْكَمُّونِ وَالْقِرْفَةِ فِي كُلِّ مَكَانٍ.
sentences.translation: Miris začina poput kumina i cimeta bio je svuda.
sentences.translationEn: The smell of spices like cumin and cinnamon was everywhere.

sentences.arabic: اشْتَرَيْتُ بَعْضَ الزَّعْفَرَانِ الطَّازَجِ لِوَصْفَةِ الدَّجَاجِ.
sentences.translation: Kupio sam malo svježeg šafrana za recept sa piletinom.
sentences.translationEn: I bought some fresh saffron for the chicken recipe.
